prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Honda RA122E (3.5L V12, 72° bank angle, 60-valve, 680 hp @ 13,000 RPM)** with a **Tomei 272° duration, 12.5mm lift camshaft** set for high-RPM power delivery, paired with **Ferrea titanium intake/exhaust valves (5.5mm stem, 33mm head diameter)** and **Supertech dual valve springs (1,200 lb/in rate)** to prevent valve float at 14,000 RPM redline.

Install a **custom-built, 12-into-1 equal-length stainless steel exhaust manifold (321-grade, 1.75" primary tubes, 3.5" collector)** by **Capristo**, featuring **Inconel 625 turbine housings** for the **Honeywell Garrett GT35R turbochargers (8465-5003S, .82 A/R, 76mm inducer)** with **TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV (dual-stage, 1.5" outlet)** for 1.2 bar boost pressure.

Replace the stock **McLaren/Honda 6-speed manual transaxle (Weismann dog-ring, 2.38:1 1st gear)** with a **Hewland NLT sequential gearbox (6-speed, magnesium case, 2.56:1 1st gear, 0.85:1 6th gear)** paired with a **Tilton 7.25" triple-plate carbon-carbon clutch (300 ft-lb torque capacity)** and **Penske 8760 adjustable LSD (45% lockup, 1.5-way ramp angle)** for optimized power transfer.
estetica: Apply a **full carbon-fiber body kit by C-West (MP4/6-specific, 1991 Monaco GP replica)** including **front splitter with integrated Gurney flap (3mm thickness, 120mm extension)**, **side skirts with vortex generators (50mm height, 3D-printed ABS core)**, and **rear diffuser with active aero flaps (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 20° adjustable angle)** for downforce optimization at 200+ mph.

Install **OMP KS-10 carbon-fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified, 1.2kg shell weight)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2, 3" lap belts, HANS-compatible)** and **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (320mm diameter, suede grip, quick-release hub)** wrapped in **custom Alcantara (Alcantara S.p.A., 1.2mm thickness, perforated for grip)** with **embroidered 1991 Ayrton Senna signature logo**.

Replace all exterior lighting with **Hella Rallye 3000 (7" diameter, 100W H3 bulbs, yellow-tinted lenses)** for vintage aesthetics, paired with **custom LED taillights (Osram Oslon SSL 80, 6000K, sequential turn signals)** and **carbon-fiber side mirrors (Zircotec-coated, 30% weight reduction, heated glass)** with **integrated rear-facing cameras (Mobius ActionCam Mini, 1080p/120fps)** for blind-spot monitoring.
